displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Co-created with Dr. Francesa Fusco, scalp expert from New York, so you have your hair always on your side. This exclusive formula, with aqua mineral complex gently cleanses your hair so that you can wash your hair everyday and keep your hair soft, smooth and full of life.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Pour onto hand
2. Apply evenly on to hair
3. Massage gently and rinse off thoroughly

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION

product.description:
Each travel set contains 3X50ml (Body wash 50ml, shampoo 50ml, conditioner 50ml)

About Cloversoft:
Cloversoft key mission is to create only the safest and most eco-friendly products to the community where part of the sales proceed are donated to Polar Bears International to save our polar bears.

metaData.Ingredients:
Cloversoft Shampoo (Rose, Vanilla, Lemongrass) 50Ml
Aqua, Sodium Lauryl Glutamate (Plant-Derived), Glycerin (Vegetable Origin), Plant Protein Blend - Hydrolyzed Vegetable Protein & Hydrolyzed Pea Protein, Ginger Extract, Vitamin B5, Organic Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract (Aloe Vera), Guar Gum (Plant-Derived), Sodium Chloride, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid (Vegetable Origin), Sodium Benzoate (Biodegradable Preservative), Biotin, Ginkgo Biloba Leaf and Essential Oil Scent – Rose, Vanilla, Lemongrass

Cloversoft Conditioner (Rose, Vanilla, Lemongrass) 50Ml
Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Olive Oil, Jojoba Oil, Vitamin E, Plant Protein Blend - Hydrolyzed Vegetable Protein & Hydrolyzed Pea Protein, Ginger Extract, Vitamin B5, Sodium Benzoate (Biodegradable Preservative), Biotin, Ginkgo Biloba Leaf and Essential Oil Scent - Rose, Vanilla, Lemongrass

Cloversoft Body Wash (Grapefruit & Rosemary) 50Ml
Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate (Plant-Derived), Sodium Lauroyi Glutamate (Vegetable Origin), N-Cocoacly Glycine, Sodium Salts (Vegetable Origin), Betaine (Sugar Beets), Clycerin (Vegetable Origin), Sodium Chloride (Natural Salt), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid (Vegetable Origin), Sodium Benzoate (Biodegradable Preservative). Essential Oil Scent From Crapefruit & Rosemary
metaData.Key Information:
Whether you are traveling by airplane or having guests over, or just want a trial size hygiene items, then this bundle is for you!

Cloversoft Self-Care Travel Set includes body wash, conditioner, shampoo (50ml each):
- Body Wash: Contains organic aloe vera, a natural ingredient that moisturise your skin and gently removes surface grime and body odour
- Shampoo & Conditioner: Made using Plant-Based Protein, which is just like keratin & silk but vegan. Smooths and Softens Your Hair

Each bundle contains body wash (50ml) + shampoo (50ml) + conditioner (50ml).
metaData.SAP Product Name: CLOVERSOFT TRAVEL SET (BODY WASH & HAIR WASH) 1S
